UI_trait_NL_ByakuganDesc: Possesses the Byakugan. Greatly expands perception and field of vision. +5 Foraging search radius, immunity to weather and darkness foraging penalties, and grants Eagle Eyed and Keen Hearing.
UI_trait_NL_SharinganDesc: Possesses the Sharingan. 95% chance to evade physical zombie attacks, preventing bites, scratches, cuts, and infection.
UI_trait_NL_SenjuDesc: Possesses the powerful chakra reserves of the Senju. Grants massive endurance reserves and recovery, and suppresses exhaustion warnings.
